title: telosma africana
intro: Telosma africana is a flowering plant species in the family Asclepiadaceae, commonly known as the Yellow Mandevilla. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Telosma africana include reducing fever, treating malaria, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, such as capsules and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
